title: REDUCED RATE UTILITY PROGRAM - 211info
text: CITY OF ESTACADA REDUCED RATE UTILITY PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides reduced rates on water, sewer, and storm drain bills. 475 SE Main Street Estacada, OR 97023 Eligibility: Ages 62 and older who are at or below 60% of Oregon’s current median income. Must be the applicant's primary residence, and service must be billed in the applicant's name. Hours: Monday-Thursday 7:30am-5pm Email (503) 630-8270 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 630-8270 Ext: 205 Public Works/Parks & Recreation (503) 655-8211 Police Department Clackamas County Sheriff (503) 630-8270 Public Works / Recreation Main phone (503) 630-8270 [email protected] TTY/TTD (800) 735-2900 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information. Applications are available online. A renewal application must be submitted each year before July 1st to continue on the program. FEES: Discount based on single family residential Water $22.35 per month for 3/4" meter and $4.15 per 1,000 gallons Sewer $70 per month flat fee Storm Drain $6.56 per month flat fee DOCUMENTS: Proof of age and annual income AREA SERVED: City of Estacada Services: Discounted Sewer Service * Older Adults Discounted Water Service * Older Adults Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - CITY OF ESTACADA If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CITY OF ESTACADA
